_comment: DemonPulse V8 — Default Filter Configuration. Edit thresholds, weights, and enabled flags freely. Do NOT change filter_class without updating the corresponding Python class.

filters._section: HARD BLOCK FILTERS — evaluated first. Any triggered filter forces PASS.
filters.name: Extreme Chaos Block
filters.description: Force PASS if simulation chaos rating reaches EXTREME. Race is too unpredictable.

filters.name: Minimum Confidence Block
filters.description: Force PASS if simulation confidence is too low. Set to LOW to disable in practice.

filters.name: Invalid Data Block
filters.description: Force PASS if race data is invalid: too few runners, bad odds, or insufficient simulation runs.

filters.name: Structural Race Block
filters.description: Force PASS if no meaningful separation in simulation results — race is a genuine toss-up.

filters.name: Market Suspension Block
filters.description: Force PASS if market appears suspended: total implied probability outside valid range (0.50–1.65). Low threshold allows small 3-4 runner fields while still catching suspended/manipulated markets.

filters._section: CORE DECISION FILTERS — primary scoring layer.
filters.name: Simulation Win Rate
filters.description: Top runner must win a minimum % of simulations. Strong win rate boosts confidence.

filters.name: Early Speed Advantage
filters.description: Does the top runner have early speed advantage?

filters.name: Positional Map Advantage
filters.description: Does the top runner's race pattern suit the projected pace?

filters.name: Track/Distance Suitability
filters.description: Is the top runner well-suited to this track and distance?

filters.name: Race Shape Suitability
filters.description: Does the projected race shape structurally favour our selection?

filters.name: Place Rate
filters.description: Top runner place rate (top 3) across simulations.

filters._section: RISK FILTERS — reduce confidence or downgrade bet.
filters.name: Interference Risk (Greyhounds)
filters.description: High interference events in greyhound simulations — risky race.

filters.name: Wide Position Risk (Thoroughbreds)
filters.description: Top selection is wide-drawn or running wide — extra work.

filters.name: Parked Risk (Harness)
filters.description: Top runner is expected to be PARKED (wide without cover) — energy drain risk.

filters.name: Inconsistency Risk
filters.description: Low confidence_factor indicates unreliable recent form.

filters.name: Market Drift Warning
filters.description: Market odds diverging significantly from simulation — informational only.

filters.name: Collapse Risk
filters.description: HIGH collapse risk with leader selection — fade risk elevated.

filters._section: VALUE FILTERS — identify overlays and hidden runners.
filters.name: Simulation vs Market Value
filters.description: Sim win% vs market implied probability. Positive edge = overlay.

filters.name: Hidden Value Detection
filters.description: Detects runners flagged as hidden value by aggregator.

filters.name: False Favourite Detection
filters.description: Market favourite is overbet relative to simulation evidence.

filters.name: Underbet Runner
filters.description: Detects large-odds runners with strong simulation performance — underbet.

filters.name: Clean Run Value
filters.description: Top runner had clean runs in most simulations — market may not price this.

filters._section: OUTPUT FILTER — always runs last, converts confidence to decision.
filters.name: Output Decision
filters.description: Converts final confidence score to BET / SMALL_BET / SAVE_BET / CAUTION / PASS.
